source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #69
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. Beyond the Horizon posted a video about his thoughts on purchasing a Star Atlas mining
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
I Bought A Star Atlas Mining Ship!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about his thoughts on purchasing a Star Atlas mining ship.
Star Atlas Chatter #4 — REC Alpha straight from Wagner!
RahMega published an article about the past week of Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas Chatter #4 – REC ALPHA from Wagner! Week in Review 7/1 – 7/8 2023
RahMega posted a video recapping the Star Atlas news of the past week.
STAR ATLAS #189 REMOVE YOUR LOWBIE NOW!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Metaverse Nomads #102 Star Atlas w/ Funcracker and Viktor | Aephia Industries
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
SAGE: RESOURCE EXTRACTION & CRAFTING – A GUIDE
Aephia published a guide to the upcoming SAGE REC game.
Star Atlas REC Micheal Wagner Drops Info and Alpha!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about info on the SAGE REC game.
Star Atlas : The DAO and PIP-1 A Quick Overview
PockThePirate posted a video about the first proposal to the Star Atlas DAO.
STAR ATLAS PIP GUIDE – How To Vote In Star Atlas DAO
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about how to vote in the Star Atlas DAO.
Day In The Life of a STAR ATLAS fan
Atlas Theory posted a video of his daily Star Atlas routine.
Star Atlas Q2 2023 Econ Report w Steven Sabol, Star Dust Economy, and Viktor
The Hologram News Network posted a video discussing the Star Atlas economy report.
Star Atlas : Ground Racing Gameplay
PockThePirate posted a video of Star Atlas ground racing gameplay.
#8 | R.E.C EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW TO GET STARTED | Star Atlas
Pathfinder posted a video going over Aephia’s guide to Star Atlas SAGE REC.
the Atlas brew #71
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
Shoot for the Stars — Star Atlas Launches Metaverse Photography Career Contest
Star Atlas published an article about a photography contest.
